title: Is it possible to link items in one board to groups in other boards?
excerpt: Hi, apologies if this is posted in the wrong place. In a scenario where one board holds project names in items and another holds project names in groups, is it possible to link an item in the first board to a group in th…

posts.author: JeremyAnson (Jeremy Anson)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, apologies if this is posted in the wrong place. In a scenario where one board holds project names in items and another holds project names in groups, is it possible to link an item in the first board to a group in the second? If this is possible, can the group name be inherited from the item name such that a change in item name in the first board is automatically reflected in the group name?
